channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Portrayal of Guilt Announce New Album and Tour, Unleash Two Singles: Stream
item.description: 🔥 Pump up the volume! Portrayal of Guilt is back with new music and tour dates! 🎸🤘#NewMusicAlert #TourAnnouncement

item.title: Harry Styles Believes Playing Residencies Instead of Touring Makes For a “Better Show”
item.description: 🌟 Harry Styles bringing the party to one spot 🎤 Who's ready for the ultimate concert experience?! 🕺 #MusicNews #HarryStyles

item.title: Jack Johnson, Alanis Morissette, Ty Dolla $ign, Vic Mensa Lead New Wave of SXSW 2026 Additions
item.description: 🌟 The SXSW lineup just got even hotter with @jackjohnson, @Alanis, @tydollasign, and @VicMensa joining the party! 🔥🎶 #SXSW2026 #MusicNews

item.title: Primus, Janelle Monae, Kurt Vile, Bouncing Souls, Hot Mulligan, more playing NJ’s North 2 Shore
item.description: 🎶 The North 2 Shore lineup is on fire! 🔥 Who's ready for an epic music-filled summer? 🌊🎸 #North2Shore #MusicFestivals

item.title: The Feelies celebrating 50th anniversary with 2 NJ shows (only 2026 dates)
item.description: 🎉 Let's party like it's 1976! The Feelies are bringing their iconic vibes to NJ for 2 epic shows! 🎶 #Feelies50thAnniversary
